StyledText.Data: The URL to the server environment.
This is the name of the environment.
A description that helps us remeber what thie purpose is with this server environment and under which circumstances it is used.
A deployment environment is where FAT:s preview and publish servers are located.
Called "awsEnvironment" when communicating with Task Server.
The URL to the admin interface of the environment.
The id is not a user email address, it is the database id for the particular user and is needed when generating the private key on Funkis Cloud.
This is the private key used for creating titles and more on Funkis Cloud
This is the default environment for new titles.
Title servers for preview and delivery
The full path fort admin of a specifc title. Used for links from FAT.
